> [!IMPORTANT]
> **You are on the `joss-paper` branch — the Journal of Open Source Software (JOSS) submission branch.**
> This branch is intentionally trimmed: it hosts **only** the latest version of the JOSS paper (under [`paper/`](../paper/)).
> For the actual `Scikit-longitudinal` source code, tests, documentation and tooling, switch to the [`main`](https://github.com/simonprovost/scikit-longitudinal/tree/main) branch or read the [official documentation](https://scikit-longitudinal.readthedocs.io/latest/).
>
> - Public peer review: [openjournals/joss-reviews#8481](https://github.com/openjournals/joss-reviews/issues/8481)
> - Published paper: [10.21105/joss.08481](https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.08481)
